specification.result: Done. Summary: | - Selected issue **#157** (sdlc scope): "Remove shared-rules read instruction from SKILL.md files (ADR-001 C2 Phase 2)" | - Added **FR-S39** to `documents/requirements-sdlc.md` (section 3.39) with 4 acceptance criteria; Appendix C updated.

design.result: I produced `02-plan.md` with 3 variants: | - **Variant A (recommended, effort S):** Remove only the `# BEFORE YOU DO ANYTHING` heading + shared-rules read instruction (lines 7-11). Keep "first tool call MUST be" instructions as standalone paragraphs. Smallest blast radius, preserves useful agent-specific guidance. | - **Variant B (effort S):** Remove the entire block including first-tool-call inst

decision.result: Done. I selected **Variant A**, produced the task breakdown in `03-decision.md`, updated SDS §3.4 with FR-S39 details, created branch `sdlc/issue-157`, and opened draft PR #171. Issue #157 commented.
